subcodes.first_line: Convey to thy honoured companion, on behalf of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, Most Glorious and Most Wondrous greetings, and say that the comfort of prisoners and their education and training [3.5s]... O thou who art turning thy face to the divine Kingdom! Thy respected wife
subcodes.first_line_orig: بقرينه محترمه‌ات از قبل عبدالبهآء تحيّت ابدع ابهی ابلاغ دار و بگو که نوازش مسجونين و تربيتشان و تعليمشان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
